package rulecoverage

func PositiveFilepathSplitBaseOnly() string {
    ruleID := "filepath_split_base_only"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`filepath.Split(...)` when only the base name is used."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
